vlm_note: Board fit is GOOD (bottom red base snaps exactly to v15 marker). ThePhantom's side is consistent: grant {BRICK,SHEEP,WHEAT} == v14 (black), other black v11. But Legadzo FAILS: its two red settlements are at v9 [1,6,18]={WHEAT,BRICK,SHEEP} and v15 [3,4,12]={BRICK,WOOD,WHEAT} (both blob-detected + crop-confirmed), while its meta grant {SHEEP,WHEAT,WOOD} matches ONLY v16 [4,12,13] — which is EMPTY (the sheep-2 tile corner, no piece). So no placed Legadzo settlement produces its granted multiset (v9 has BRICK-not-WOOD, v15 has BRICK-not-SHEEP), consistent with a single board-CV hex misread flipping SHEEP<->BRICK near this corner. Fail-closed: the grant self-check must pass for BOTH players; declined rather than ship an opening whose board/grant don't cohere.
